author: Shadow6six
name: bravesearch
short: Brave Search + optional AI Answers integration
description: Type `[p]bravesearch` for help or `[p]bravesearch <query>` to search the web. Provides fast Brave web results and optional AI-powered answers using the Brave API.
install_msg:
BraveSearch installed!

This cog uses the Brave Search API[](https://search.brave.com/). 

• Web search works without a key.
• AI Answers require a free Brave API key (set with `[p]bravesearch setkey`).
end_user_data_statement: No user data is stored beyond guild configuration and temporary in-memory conversation history for AI answers.
